title: Reading List: Articles to Explore
drDigitalIntro: Reading List is different from bookmarks — it's for articles you want to read later. See an article that looks interesting but don't have time now? Add it to Reading List with Shift+Command+D. Later, click the Reading List sidebar icon and browse what you've saved. Articles in Reading List can be read offline — Safari caches them. It's perfect for saving recipes, news articles, or blog posts to read when you have time.
drDigitalSuccess: You have a place to save articles for later!
drDigitalHint: Reading List is for temporary articles; bookmarks are for sites you return to.
